en.title: Stackoverflow Answer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a stackoverflow post. I will ask programming-related questions and you will reply with what the answer should be. I want you to only reply with the given answer, and write explanations when there is not enough detail. do not write explanations. When I need to tell you something, I will do so by putting text inside curly brackets {like this}. My first question is [programming question]
en.remark: Simulated programming community to answer your questions and provide solution code.

metaDescription: Stuck on coding? Get concise, accurate answers to your programming questions. Receive code snippets without fluff, just safe solutions instantly!

faq.q: Is the AI really searching Stack Overflow?
faq.a: No, it's only "simulating" the answer style. The code may be a snippet it saw in training or something it makes up. Before running, search the actual error on Stack Overflow or GitHub yourself; the links the AI gives are almost always fake.

faq.q: How do I follow up when the code won't run?
faq.a: Paste the full error message including the stack trace, don't just say "it doesn't work." The AI can only locate problems from specific errors; a vague "I got an error" leaves it guessing and the "fix" may introduce new bugs. Pasting the real error is the highest-ROI follow-up.
